title: Useful Signs
description: Resource pack for Minecraft 1.19.x-1.20.1 that adds railway signs to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod
body:
Welcome to Useful Signs! This resource pack is for people who want extra creativity in their worlds. For Minecraft 1.19.2, this reosurce pack, dependent on the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, adds more railway signs to their worlds. It is also recommended that this pack is used with the Joban Client Mod, and MTR Station Decoration. Thank you for using this!


<details>
<summary>How to select sign tiles</summary>
1. Place down a railway sign, then get a brush from the creative menu.
2. Right-click the railway sign with your brush to select a sign tile.

</details>
